character_buff.name: Sages Will
character_buff.description: Empower your allies with your strong willpower as a Sage and researcher.
character_buff.target: Family members within a range of 10m

skills.name: Recover
skills.description: Cure various abnormal disease that might afflict team members.

skills.name: Resuscitation
skills.description: Heals a character who is incapable of combat.

skills.name: Cure All
skills.description: Restores HP of an ally by large amount.

skills.name: Mass Cure
skills.description: Fully recover HP of all team members.

skills.name: Intensify
skills.description: Increases ATK of all team members.

skills.name: Fortify
skills.description: Increases Max HP of all team members. Not applied with [Acceleration] simultaneously.

skills.name: Acceleration
skills.description: Increases Attack/Move SPD of all team members. Not applied with [Fortify] simultaneously.

skills.name: Meditation
skills.description: Increases HP/SP Regen. of all team members.

skills.name: Spiritual Shield
skills.description: Grants the allies powerful Mental Protection

skills.name: Anti-Magic Shell
skills.description: Grants the allies powerful Elemental Protection.

skills.name: Protection Field
skills.description: Grants a powerful defensive field to friendly forces. However you cant use items.

skills.name: Dispel Magic
skills.description: Removes all buffs and curses on team members and on all enemies around you and decreases SP Recovery for a while.

skills.name: Magic Barrier
skills.description: Casts a shield over the team which protects them from magical attacks. Increase Magical RES.

skills.name: Ignore Harm
skills.description: Casts a shield over the team which gives them immunity against debuffs. Increases Debuff RES a bit.

skills.name: Invulnerable
skills.description: Casts a shield over an ally that protects him from all attacks. Prohibits item usage. Buff is removed on stance switching.

skills.name: Howling of Heaven
skills.description: A thundering roar from the skies that sends enemies into a state of panic.

levels.value: 100% chance to send enemy into Panic status for 5.5 sec.
100% chance to send enemy into Panic status for 10 sec.
100% chance to send enemy into Panic status for 10.5 sec.
100% chance to send enemy into Panic status for 11 sec.
100% chance to send enemy into Panic status for 11.5 sec.

skills.name: Reverse
skills.description: Immobilize enemies by suspending them in the air.

skills.name: Photon Splash
skills.description: Fires a series of Psychokinetic blasts.

skills.name: Amplify
skills.description: Increase magical power.

skills.name: Hole of Darkness
skills.description: Creates a powerful gravity field that pins down all surrounding enemies.
skills.target: Up to 12 enemies within a range of 8m

skills.name: Deep Sleep
skills.description: Enhanced skill of Sandman. Summon other-worldly moth power which has a dark light to make enemies sleep.

skills.name: Improve Disease
skills.description: Enhances its curse, DEF abilities but will be immobilized and attribute RES will be decreased.

skills.name: Blood Curse
skills.description: To increase external damage to enemies in a range, it calls down bloody curse.

skills.name: Gloomy Present
skills.description: The curse of abyss that narrows your view and decrease your Movement Speed.

skills.name: Whole Cancellation
skills.description: Can debuff the enemies in the range and limit enemies to use skill.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies within a range of 5m

stances.name: Telekinesis

skills.name: Wind Pressure
skills.description: Throw the air blades to give a shock to enemy.
skills.target: Up to 9 enemies 10m away and within 9m width

skills.name: Avalanche
skills.description: Summon a pile of stones to make landslide above head of enemy.
skills.target: Up to 3x additional Damage against monsters in proportion to the casters final [
special: Additional 100 DEF removed against PC in proportion to the casters final [
Additional 100 DEF removed against PC in proportion to the casters final [

skills.name: Weather Ring
skills.description: Enemy will be weathered with a strong sandstorm.
skills.target: Up to 24 enemies 12m away and within a 10m radius

skills.name: Eraser
skills.description: Cancel the buffs that benefit the enemies.
skills.target: Up to 15 enemies 5m away within a radius of 12m

skills.name: Falling Meteorite
skills.description: Summon a huge meteor and drop it down to the ground.
skills.target: Up to 3x additional Damage against monsters in proportion to the casters final [
special: Additional 100 DEF removed against PC in proportion to the casters final [
Additional 100 DEF removed against PC in proportion to the casters final [

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 8% of extra [INT]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 5% DMG according to extra [INT]
Ignore additional RES according to extra [INT] * 4
Additional DMG against Monster according to 5 * 50

stances.name: Ancient Spirit

skills.name: Raeloss
skills.description: Slow the enemy with the power of gravity.

skills.name: Katore
skills.description: Slow the enemys ATK SPD with magic.

skills.name: Photon Strike
skills.description: Shower powerful magical spheres toward a single enemy.

skills.name: Hall of Twilight
skills.description: Pull and knockdown the enemies with the force of gravity.
skills.target: Up to 12 enemies within a range of 8m

skills.name: Additional Spirit
skills.description: Muster the strength by borrowing strength from the gods.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 8% of extra [INT]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 3% DMG according to extra [INT]
Ignore additional RES according to extra [INT] * 1
Additional DMG against Monster according to 3 * 50

skills.name: Consolidation
skills.description: Increases penetration rate.

skills.name: Prompt Action
skills.description: Skill casting time of your family decreases.

skills.name: Divine Bless
skills.description: Increases HP and SP regeneration of your family. Regeneration increases with level.

skills.name: Refresh Mind
skills.description: Clear mind of target to remove abnormal status, and reset all cooldowns for current stance.

skills.name: Principal
skills.description: Provide basic buffs to team. The power can be doubled according to the circumstances.

skills.name: Melee Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Melee Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Magic Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Magic Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Shooting Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Shoot Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Escape Artist
skills.description: Cancel darkness type curse on squad members as well as detect invisibility. Increase resistance of darkness type curse for a given time.

stances.name: Ancient Tactics

skills.name: Miracle
skills.description: Execute a tactic that increases the offensive and defensive capacity of the ally.

skills.name: Protecting Booster
skills.description: Increase the defensive capacity of target ally.

skills.name: Shearing Booster
skills.description: Increase the offensive capacity of target ally.

skills.name: Bartor
skills.description: Remove all harmful effects and restore HP of all team members.

skills.name: Additional Training
skills.description: Increase skill level by enhancing own tactical capacity.

levels.value: Increase all skills level by enhancing your own tactical capacity.
Increase all skills level by enhancing your own tactical capacity.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 2% of extra [None]

skills.name: Encourage
skills.description: Dramatically enhances the offensive abilities of team members. Cannot be stacked with certain buffs.

skills.name: Pulsate
skills.description: Increases the speed of the designated ally.

skills.name: Meditate
skills.description: Enhances the ATK of the designated ally according to their combat attributes.

skills.name: Netherworld
skills.description: Maximizes the offensive capabilities of the selected character by leveraging their strengths.

skills.name: Additional Assist
skills.description: Installs a tactical trap. Upon casting, reduces the cooldown of all of your characters except [Additional Assist].
